backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing product management (CRUD operations for admins), user profile management, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization with public product queries and admin-only mutations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: adding the Meesho product image to the product browsing page and making it clickable with an affiliate redirect URL.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration, detailing React Query setup, image loading states, authentication flows, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system using warm neutrals, earth tones, and CSS variables for light/dark theme support.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Fashion Forum' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with TanStack Router setup, route definitions for product browsing/detail/admin pages, and profile setup modal logic that waits for identity initialization.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon and message for non-admin users attempting to access admin-only pages.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component with button group for filtering products by category or showing all products with rounded pill-style buttons.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Collapsible category section with clickable thumbnail that expands to show a grid of product images, each with individual loading states and skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, navigation, and footer that handles Internet Identity authentication, displays user profile, admin access, and provides login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: Loading indicator component that displays a timeout alert with retry option if loading exceeds a configurable duration (default 10 seconds).
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Displays a single Meesho product image (Demon Slayer T-Shirt) as a clickable link with hover overlay effect and loading state.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component that displays product image, name, category badge, price, and optional Pinterest pin indicator with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing products with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID, using react-hook-form for validation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name on first login, blocking interaction until profile setup is complete.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: Touch and mouse-enabled image gallery with swipe gestures, navigation arrows, thumbnail indicators, and a promotional Meesho product link.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Displays a carousel of ABREXO watch product images with navigation controls and a clickable Meesho link icon below the gallery.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook for loading images with retry logic, fallback support, and loading/error state management for handling image load failures gracefully.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, products, and admin status with caching, retry logic, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook providing touch and mouse event handlers for detecting left/right swipe gestures with configurable threshold.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using warm neutral tones for fashion e-commerce, including light/dark theme variables and typography settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin page for managing products with CRUD operations, access control verification, loading states, and modal dialogs for add/edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Page component for displaying product gallery (content truncated in source).
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page with hero banner, category filters, swipeable gallery, promotional images, and sections for watches and Meesho products. Includes a PromotionalImage component that displays an image with a loading state and a 'Look Out' button linking to Meesho.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page displaying individual product information including image, name, price, description, category badge, and optional Pinterest link. Includes loading states, error handling, and navigation back to product browse.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended typography with Inter and Playfair Display fonts, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting existing features for adding a Meesho product image to the browse page and making it clickable with an affiliate redirect link.
